TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_Fuli, title = Fuli, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/Fuli} }

S.FORM: Fuli (Zosi go, 富里鄉) mki sku Hualien. su'unun kwara glabang lingay 'kiyan ga 172.01 km² (rhyan rinpang glabang lingay 'kiyan ga 67.31 km², rr'an hyan glabang lingay 'kiyan ga 1.93 km²), 2,030 hi ku su'unun kwara alang hi kya, 783 buwan ku kwarakya, tiku sahuy na alang Gyencumin ga 1,086 hi, kyala kwara pinspung s'uli ga 53%. kwara sahuy na alang Gyencumin ga Taywang Gyencumin na Amis ku smrrhu ku pyux s'uli taya kya. sinpngan sehu s'uli sku sahuy go. ays ptyaw sebu Fuli ays psgayun 13 ru 9 alang. 9 alang hani ga, Cilamitay , Talampo , Monating , Cirakesay , Pacuya , Ancoh , Maliwang , Lupo , Cihalaay .

Fuli (Zosi go, 富里鄉) mki sku Hualien. su'unun kwara glabang lingay 'kiyan ga 172.01 km² (rhyan rinpang glabang lingay 'kiyan ga 67.31 km², rr'an hyan glabang lingay 'kiyan ga 1.93 km²), 2,030 hi ku su'unun kwara alang hi kya, 783 buwan ku kwarakya, tiku sahuy na alang Gyencumin ga 1,086 hi, kyala kwara pinspung s'uli ga 53%. kwara sahuy na alang Gyencumin ga Taywang Gyencumin na Amis ku smrrhu ku pyux s'uli taya kya. sinpngan sehu s'uli sku sahuy go. ays ptyaw sebu Fuli ays psgayun 13 ru 9 alang. 9 alang hani ga, Cilamitay , Talampo , Monating , Cirakesay , Pacuya , Ancoh , Maliwang , Lupo , Cihalaay .
S.PHON: *uli (zos~ɕi ɣo, ***) mki s~ɕku ħualien. s~ɕuʔunun kwara ɣlaβaŋ liŋaj ʔkijan ɣa ***.** km* (rħjan rinpaŋ ɣlaβaŋ liŋaj ʔkijan ɣa **.** km*, rrʔan ħjan ɣlaβaŋ liŋaj ʔkijan ɣa *.** km*), *,*** ħi ku s~ɕuʔunun kwara alaŋ ħi kja, *** βuwan ku kwarakja, tiku s~ɕaħuj na alaŋ ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa *,*** ħi, kjala kwara pins~ɕpuŋ s~ɕʔuli ɣa **%. kwara s~ɕaħuj na alaŋ ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa tajwaŋ ɣjenʦ~ʨumin na amis~ɕ ku s~ɕmrrħu ku pjux s~ɕʔuli taja kja. s~ɕinpŋan s~ɕeħu s~ɕʔuli s~ɕku s~ɕaħuj ɣo. ajs~ɕ ptjaw s~ɕeβu *uli ajs~ɕ ps~ɕɣajun ** ru * alaŋ. * alaŋ ħani ɣa, ʦ~ʨilamitaj , talampo , monatiŋ , ʦ~ʨirakes~ɕaj , paʦ~ʨuja , anʦ~ʨoħ , maliwaŋ , lupo , ʦ~ʨiħalaaj .
